TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mitapi’, title = Mitapi’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mitapi’} }

S.FORM: Mitapi' Itiya ika 50, 60 ayaw mihcaan, ofafahiyan ku malo'ay tuluma' kono 'Amis, o pakaylaan no lamud i, o fa'inayan ku mikadafuay, i winaay kupi palucukan to ngangan no wawa. anu o dafung umah ato ^can, fafahiyan kumi dutucay, tahaani:ni mafalicay tukulintad, omahaennay a laylay i, lahedaw satu, itini iniyaro' ya 70, 80 ku mihcaan a fa'inayan a malitengay, itiyaho sahetu o mikadafuay ku lamud. Ofafahiyan ku malo'ay tuluma' alintad, malawdtu ku kacifa'inayan no limecedan no 'Amis, nuilatu kumihalatengan a kapah, hanaca i falucu'ay nu wina atu wama, uculentu no malitengay tayla iluma' nuya kapah mitapi', o mitapi' ademak i okaying ko tayla i luma'nuya kapah dademak, tudung tu masasiulahay a pakaylaan, nomitapi'i, cica^dungay tu lusid atu liliten kufukes, tudungay tu nguduen kuluma' no fa'inayan.
S.PHON: mitapiʡ itija ika **, ** ajaw miħʦaan, o~ufafaħijan ko~u~u maɾo~uʡaj to~u~uɾo~u~umaʡ ko~uno~u ʡamis, o~u pakajɾaan no~u ɾamo~u~uɬ~ɮ i, o~u faʡinajan ko~u~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~u~uaj, i winaaj ko~u~upi paɾo~u~uʦo~u~ukan to~u ŋaŋan no~u wawa. ano~u~u o~u ɬ~ɮafo~u~uŋ o~u~umaħ ato~u ʔʦan, fafaħijan ko~u~umi ɬ~ɮo~u~uto~u~uʦaj, taħaani:ni mafaɾiʦaj to~u~uko~u~uɾintaɬ~ɮ, o~umaħaənnaj a ɾajɾaj i, ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw sato~u~u, itini inijaro~uʡ ja **, ** ko~u~u miħʦaan a faʡinajan a maɾitəŋaj, itijaħo~u saħəto~u~u o~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~u~uaj ko~u~u ɾamo~u~uɬ~ɮ. o~ufafaħijan ko~u~u maɾo~uʡaj to~u~uɾo~u~umaʡ aɾintaɬ~ɮ, maɾawɬ~ɮto~u~u ko~u~u kaʦifaʡinajan no~u ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis, no~u~uiɾato~u~u ko~u~umiħaɾatəŋan a kapaħ, ħanaʦa i faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡaj no~u~u wina ato~u~u wama, o~u~uʦo~u~uɾənto~u~u no~u maɾitəŋaj tajɾa iɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~uja kapaħ mitapiʡ, o~u mitapiʡ aɬ~ɮəmak i o~ukajiŋ ko~u tajɾa i ɾo~u~umaʡno~u~uja kapaħ ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u masasio~u~uɾaħaj a pakajɾaan, no~umitapiʡi, ʦiʦaʔɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ ato~u~u ɾiɾitən ko~u~ufo~u~ukəs, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uən ko~u~uɾo~u~umaʡ no~u faʡinajan.
S.FORM: Mitapi' Itiya ika 50, 60 ayaw mihcaan, ofafahiyan ku malo'ay tuluma' kono 'Amis, o pakaylaan no lamud i, o fa'inayan ku mikadafuay, i winaay kupi palucukan to ngangan no wawa. anu o dafung umah ato ^can, fafahiyan kumi dutucay, tahaani:ni mafalicay tukulintad, omahaennay a laylay i, lahedaw satu, itini iniyaro' ya 70, 80 ku mihcaan a fa'inayan a malitengay, itiyaho sahetu o mikadafuay ku lamud. Ofafahiyan ku malo'ay tuluma' alintad, malawdtu ku kacifa'inayan no limecedan no 'Amis, nuilatu kumihalatengan a kapah, hanaca i falucu'ay nu wina atu wama, uculentu no malitengay tayla iluma' nuya kapah mitapi', o mitapi' ademak i okaying ko tayla i luma'nuya kapah dademak, tudung tu masasiulahay a pakaylaan, nomitapi'i, cica^dungay tu lusid atu liliten kufukes, tudungay tu nguduen kuluma' no fa'inayan.
S.PHON: mitapiʡ itija ika **, ** ajaw miħʦaan, o~ufafaħijan ko~u~u maɾo~uʡaj to~u~uɾo~u~umaʡ ko~uno~u ʡamis, o~u pakajɾaan no~u ɾamo~u~uɬ~ɮ i, o~u faʡinajan ko~u~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~u~uaj, i winaaj ko~u~upi paɾo~u~uʦo~u~ukan to~u ŋaŋan no~u wawa. ano~u~u o~u ɬ~ɮafo~u~uŋ o~u~umaħ ato~u ʔʦan, fafaħijan ko~u~umi ɬ~ɮo~u~uto~u~uʦaj, taħaani:ni mafaɾiʦaj to~u~uko~u~uɾintaɬ~ɮ, o~umaħaənnaj a ɾajɾaj i, ɾaħəɬ~ɮaw sato~u~u, itini inijaro~uʡ ja **, ** ko~u~u miħʦaan a faʡinajan a maɾitəŋaj, itijaħo~u saħəto~u~u o~u mikaɬ~ɮafo~u~uaj ko~u~u ɾamo~u~uɬ~ɮ. o~ufafaħijan ko~u~u maɾo~uʡaj to~u~uɾo~u~umaʡ aɾintaɬ~ɮ, maɾawɬ~ɮto~u~u ko~u~u kaʦifaʡinajan no~u ɾiməʦəɬ~ɮan no~u ʡamis, no~u~uiɾato~u~u ko~u~umiħaɾatəŋan a kapaħ, ħanaʦa i faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡaj no~u~u wina ato~u~u wama, o~u~uʦo~u~uɾənto~u~u no~u maɾitəŋaj tajɾa iɾo~u~umaʡ no~u~uja kapaħ mitapiʡ, o~u mitapiʡ aɬ~ɮəmak i o~ukajiŋ ko~u tajɾa i ɾo~u~umaʡno~u~uja kapaħ ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u masasio~u~uɾaħaj a pakajɾaan, no~umitapiʡi, ʦiʦaʔɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u ɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮ ato~u~u ɾiɾitən ko~u~ufo~u~ukəs, to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋaj to~u~u ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uən ko~u~uɾo~u~umaʡ no~u faʡinajan.
